title: cyclosorus alatellus
intro: Cyclosorus alatellus, also known as Alatellus fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is native to tropical Asia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus alatellus include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
